description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, rectilinear layout. The exterior is predominantly white with dark gray accents, featuring expansive floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides that allow for abundant natural light. The front facade is distinguished by a prominent entryway with a double-height arched window above the main door, flanked by symmetrical window arrangements. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with a uniquely shaped swimming pool and a paved walkway. The interior layout is open and airy, with visible partitioned rooms and a central living space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A large, modern two-story house with flat roofs, expansive windows, and a distinctive arched entryway. Features include a rear patio with a swimming pool and a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a double-height arched window, symmetrical window placement, and a prominent dark gray accent wall.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the paved walkway leading to the rear, large windows, and a glimpse of the swimming pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the spacious patio, uniquely shaped swimming pool, and extensive window coverage on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the pool area extending from the house, and the overall boxy structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and a central arched window
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a double-height arched window above a central door, framed by a dark accent wall and symmetrical windows.
